bio: Capturing light that traveled millions of years just to get here. I prefer silence and simple things. Just enjoying the view while the world turns, again.

skills.description: Image stacking (Siril, DeepSkyStacker), session planning (Stellarium), post-processing (GIMP), equatorial mount operation, polar alignment.
Python, HTML, CSS, Git, Markdown, basic Linux command line.

selected_posts.title: Searching for black holes — what an amateur can actually see

projects.description: Python made project for shark coders

interests: Deep-sky astrophotography · Python · web development · physics & reading · quiet nights under the stars.
